documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-10 | Tools: Read, Write
documents.content: Deployed new Spark job for materialization pipeline. Nathan Norman reviewed the PR. Fixed OOM error in aggregation step by increasing executor memory to 8g.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-15 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: Investigated Datadog alerts for high latency in toast-analytics queries. Root cause was missing partition pruning in Spark SQL. Added WHERE clause on event_date.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-01 | Tools: Edit, Write
documents.content: Implemented FTS5 search backend for claude-memory. Added chunking by markdown headings and BM25 scoring. Tested with 500 memory files.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-10 | Tools: Read, Bash
documents.content: Added vector search using sentence-transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Hybrid RRF merge combines keyword and vector results. Embeddings stored as BLOBs in SQLite.

documents.title: personal-docs | 2025-02-20 | Tools: Write
documents.content: Set up GitHub Pages for personal-docs. Used MDX format with Docusaurus. Configured deploy workflow with GitHub Actions.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-01 | Tools: Read, Bash
documents.content: Created Jira ticket DATA-1234 for backfill of missing restaurant dimensions. Sarah Chen provided requirements. Estimated 2 weeks for implementation.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-05 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: Slack discussion with David Kim about Grafana dashboard for pipeline latency. Agreed to add SLO alerting via Datadog monitors.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-10 | Tools: Edit, Write
documents.content: Finished Terraform module for analytics Lambda deployment. Cross-account IAM roles for preproduction-analytics to access Glue catalog in preproduction account.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-03-15 | Tools: Read, Edit
documents.content: Added conversation preservation to indexer. Conversation chunks are never pruned even when JSONL files are deleted. This is the only surviving copy of session knowledge.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-03-20 | Tools: Bash, Write
documents.content: Built addon reference database system. Skills can ship pre-built .db files. Discovery follows Claude Code skill resolution. Source routing prevents cross-contamination.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-25 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Production incident: Airflow DAG for daily materialization failed due to Spark version mismatch after EMR upgrade. Rolled back to Spark 3.4. Nathan Norman led the incident response.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-01 | Tools: Bash, Edit
documents.content: Migrated Zeppelin notebooks to new cluster. Updated JDBC connections and Spark configs. Validated all 12 scheduled notebooks run correctly.

documents.title: personal-docs | 2025-04-05 | Tools: Write
documents.content: Wrote technical blog post about building MCP servers with Python. Published on personal-docs site. Got positive feedback from colleagues on Slack.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-10 | Tools: Read, Edit
documents.content: Added igraph dependency graph for codebase indexing. SCIP parser extracts imports/calls edges. Community detection via Louvain clustering.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-15 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: Sourcegraph search revealed 15 repos importing our shared analytics library. Coordinated with David Kim and Sarah Chen on deprecation timeline for v1 API.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-20 | Tools: Edit, Write
documents.content: Implemented webhook pipeline for GitHub push events. Added timing instrumentation for indexing latency. Optimized chunk embedding to batch 32 at a time.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-12 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: Debugged Splunk query for order analytics. Found the index was toast-pos-transactions not toast-analytics. Fixed the SPL and got latency data.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-05 | Tools: Edit
documents.content: Refactored embedding cache to use content hash as key. Avoids re-embedding unchanged content across reindexes. Saved 40% reindex time.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-12 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: AWS oktoast authentication issue. Needed bedrock profile for Claude Code but was using preproduction. Tokens expire after 1 hour vs 12 hours for bedrock.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-08 | Tools: Read, Write
documents.content: Built DataHub lineage visualization for toast-analytics pipeline. Shows upstream dependencies from raw S3 to final Glue tables. Sarah Chen validated accuracy.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-20 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: Performance tuning: reduced Spark shuffle partitions from 200 to 50 for small datasets. Query time dropped from 45s to 12s. Applied to all daily materializations.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-15 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Designed mtime-based staleness detection for incremental indexing. File mtime compared against DB timestamp. O(file_count) not O(DB_size). Fast startup.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-08 | Tools: Edit
documents.content: Code review with Nathan Norman on the new dbt model for restaurant metrics. Suggested using incremental strategy instead of full refresh. Approved after fixes.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-12 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: Jira ticket DATA-1567: Kubernetes pod OOM kills on analytics worker. Increased memory limits from 4Gi to 8Gi. Monitored via Datadog container metrics.

documents.title: personal-docs | 2025-01-25 | Tools: Write
documents.content: Created project documentation template for personal-docs. Includes architecture diagrams, setup instructions, and troubleshooting guide sections.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-25 | Tools: Bash, Edit
documents.content: Implemented reindex.lock file for concurrent session safety. O_CREAT|O_EXCL ensures only one indexer runs. Stale locks auto-reclaimed after 5 minutes.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-02-08 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Discussed migration plan with Sarah Chen for moving from Redshift to Spark on EMR. Timeline: 6 weeks. Key risk: SQL compatibility for existing queries.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-03-18 | Tools: Edit, Write
documents.content: Added SessionEnd hook for automatic reindexing after each Claude Code session. Uses Popen with detached process to avoid blocking session exit.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-18 | Tools: Read, Bash
documents.content: Coordinated with David Kim on Slack about deprecating the old analytics REST API. Sent announcement to #data-platform channel. Migration deadline: May 15.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-05 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Onboarding to toast-analytics codebase. Reviewed Glue catalog schema, S3 data layout, and existing Terraform modules. Met with team lead for context.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-18 | Tools: Write
documents.content: Built Python MCP server using FastMCP. Stdio transport for Claude Code integration. Four tools: memory_search, memory_read, memory_write, get_status.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-28 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: Splunk investigation of pipeline failures. Found DNS resolution errors caused by VPN disconnection. Documented VPN check procedure for troubleshooting guide.

documents.title: personal-docs | 2025-04-02 | Tools: Read, Write
documents.content: Set up Cloudflare analytics for personal-docs site. Configured page rules and caching. Traffic mostly from GitHub referrals.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-22 | Tools: Edit
documents.content: Added LLM semantic labeling for code symbols. Uses Claude to generate human-readable descriptions of functions and classes. Stored in symbols.metadata JSON.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-28 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: Debugged cross-account IAM issue. Lambda in analytics account (286547960662) couldn't access Glue in preproduction (620354051118). Fixed trust policy.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-03-22 | Tools: Read, Bash
documents.content: Added codebase indexing support. Python script scans repos, chunks source files, generates embeddings. Incremental updates via content hash comparison.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-18 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: Helped David Kim troubleshoot Gradle build failures. Artifactory was unreachable due to VPN being disconnected. Reconnected with pritunl-vpn connect.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-02-28 | Tools: Edit, Write
documents.content: Created new Airflow DAG for weekly aggregation. Uses SparkSubmitOperator with dynamic allocation. Scheduled every Sunday at 2am UTC.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-14 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Investigated slow memory_search queries. Problem was full table scan on chunks without FTS5. Added proper FTS5 query building with prefix matching.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-25 | Tools: Edit, Bash
documents.content: Started multi-signal retrieval project. Added N-way RRF merge, temporal scoring, entity overlap, and graph re-ranking. Benchmark harness next.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-08 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Reviewed existing Spark jobs in toast-analytics. Found 8 materializations running daily, 3 weekly. All use query_manifest.json for configuration.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-02-12 | Tools: Edit
documents.content: Implemented exchange-aware chunking for conversation archives. User/assistant pairs never split across chunks. Improves retrieval coherence.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-03-30 | Tools: Bash, Read
documents.content: AWS cost review for analytics accounts. Found unused EMR clusters in preproduction costing $2k/month. Terminated and updated Terraform to prevent recreation.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-02-22 | Tools: Bash
documents.content: Pair programming with Sarah Chen on new materialization for order metrics. Used SparkSQL with window functions for running totals. Tested against sample data.

documents.title: personal-docs | 2025-04-08 | Tools: Write
documents.content: Added architecture decision records (ADRs) section to personal-docs. Documented choices for MCP transport, embedding model selection, and database schema.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-03-05 | Tools: Read, Edit
documents.content: Fixed race condition in concurrent memory writes. Added busy_timeout=5000ms for SQLite. WAL mode already enabled. No more SQLITE_BUSY errors.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-01-30 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Met with product team about new restaurant performance dashboard. Requirements: daily refresh, last 90 days, drill-down by market. Will use existing Glue tables.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-02-22 | Tools: Bash, Edit
documents.content: Set up Databricks workspace for POC in account 189462097194. Note: this is NOT the analytics account. Used for data science experiments only.

documents.title: toast-analytics | 2025-04-03 | Tools: Read
documents.content: Investigated missing data in Grafana dashboard. Found that Terraform had accidentally removed the Glue crawler schedule. Re-added and triggered manual crawl.

documents.title: claude-memory | 2025-04-16 | Tools: Bash, Write
documents.content: Added community detection using Louvain algorithm from igraph. Groups related files into clusters. Stored in communities table with codebase scope.
